---
title: 'Revelation of Jesus'
date: '2011-12-10T21:49:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6964010713636572101'
blogger_filename: '/2011/12/revelation-of-jesus.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Random'
---

<br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/jesus1-c37d044a76ad.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/jesus1-ba83603269e8.jpg" width="240" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Jesus<br />Yeshua Meshiach<br />Anointed One<br />Blood Brother<br />Lamb that was slain<br />Lion of Judah<br />My Love<br />My Passion<br /><br />MY GOD!&nbsp;</td></tr></tbody></table><br /><br />Drawn by Akaine Kramarik<br /><a href="http://www.artakiane.com/">http://www.artakiane.com/</a><br /><a href="http://www.akiane.com/life">http://www.akiane.com/life</a><br /><a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Akiane_Kramarik">http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Akiane_Kramarik</a><br /><br /><b>Revelation VS Information/Education</b><br /><br />Typically artists get a paper/pencil and start to draw, then turn to books and maybe classes. God's original intent was for man to get it on download from Heaven. Learning was secondary to revelation knowledge. Full peoms/paintings ready mind in the minds eye and coming out as natural as breathing into the visual form. Music, Art, Poetry, Books... But also architecture, lawyers knowing what to say, etc... all fields of man's work operating on revelation knowledge.<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">"When Adam fell, he fell from Revelation to Information" Bill Winston</blockquote>Adam didn't need to "learn" as we do, until after the fall. He was communicating with God. They Holy Spirit has come to show us all things and lead us into the truth. When we pray about a situation we are getting God's wisdom on download from Heaven! We don't have to rely on what we know or man's knowledge. God can show us how to do something that men have never thought of.<br /><br />EVERY invention that caused&nbsp;society&nbsp;to have a major breakthrough was God given and God inspired.&nbsp;Unfortunately&nbsp;the Church is so full of people trying to avoid the Wealth that God gave them or so preoccupied in other things that they are able to hear, many times, when God is trying to give them something. So God has had to turn to heathen who are willing to work and cause an&nbsp;invention&nbsp;to come to pass in order to get it into the earth.<br /><br />No more! God can and will use me and you to bring about new things, inspired things into this planet! When we do it, it will bring Glory to God the Father and to Jesus our Lord!<br /><br />Darrell G. Wolfe
